TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Bern / Pow-al-ni "Pow-al-ni-te a kamu, B√§rn, Te a kamu Bern,Ba a kamu Berne, I-ta-li a cudad, Berna, Low-man-s a kamu Berna" zuma a nganga Pow-en, tuki a tukay, tumay a tukuy, nu Loy-sa lyen-pangcen-bu a kitizaan, tini i Loy-s Pow-aalni-talakaw a lala', uyni dada' i Su-li-se, Ze-ney-wa atu Pa-say-al u sakasepat nu tabakiay a tukuy, nu Pow-al-ni-cow saayaway a cen-bu. Pow-al-ni malingatu patizeng i 1191 a mihcaan, 1848 a mihcaan mala nu Loy-s-lyen-pang cen-bu a kitizaan. A-le-he palatusaen uyni a tukay, satip a tukus nu balakiaytu a tukuy, sawali baluhay a tukuy, balat miawas tu A-le-he nu 7 a luma'an tu ahebalay a sangaw atu balakiay a tukuy atu baluhay a tukay patul han. . saayaw i 1983 a mihcaan, malumanan a kitizaan "Pow-al-ni kasumamadan a tukuy" mala lyen-he-kow tu nu pasubana'ay cudad a sakaput nipanutek nu kitakit a nisubelidan a zaysang, Pow-al-ni demiad tudung ku akuti' atu kasemetad, dihku tu kasienawan sapi' tu kalaludan, nu Loy-s a cen-bu atu angangan nu lalangawan. u hekal 51.6 kaahebal malebut mi, u tademaw 13. emang "2017 a mihcaan". Pow-al-ni, imi u katahkalan nu tumaya kitizaan". Pow-al-ni a tukay salingatu patizeng i 12 se-ci nu sazikuzay, katukuh 18 se-ci malepun tu patizang katukuh ayzaay a katabaki, u tukay 800 tu a mihcaan a likisi. makay 1848 a m hcaan Loy-s-lyen-pang cen-bu a nipatizengan itini hawsa, Pow-al-ni nu Loy-s a cedn-bu atu lalangawan a angangan. šľĮÁąĺŚįľ, . Pow-al-ni tini i Loy-s satipan talakaway a buyu', nipatizeng i Lay-ing-he sapica a sa'wac A-le-he u sangangiwngangiw sanay a zazan, kalidkid ku nanum makay taliyuk nu Pow-al-ni micaliway tu balakiay tu a tukay, masa tukusay a subal. Pow-al-ni i kawanan a tukus nu baluhay a tukay, balakiay a tukuy i kawali nu tukus, pitu malalitin ku sangaw. muenengay a tademaw u Tek u kamu. hekal nu Pow-al-ni "pasu likutay a kitizaan" 230 tow-pin-hang kung-li, labuay a ziyazu'12.4 emang ku tademaw, talakaw nu buyu' 550 mi. Pow-al-ni i 1191 a mihcaan patizeng tu pikawawan nu hitay. 1218 a mihcaan mala u mitekeday tu sakaput, 1339 a mihcaan miales tu pikuwan nu Te-kow pakalas tu misateked, 1353 a mihcaan milihiza tu Loy-se-lyen-pang. 1848 a mihcaan malingatu Loy-se-lyen-pang cen-bu a kitizaan, pangangan aca tu "lyen-pang tukay" han.kusi izaw ku kikay, cin-mi- kikay, mitenunay, hwa-sye, misanga'ay tu sapayu, kakanan, in-swa a sakaput. mikawaw tu tuki a ngangan "pyaw-tu" singangan i kitakit. Pow-al-ni misuped tu 80 ku luma' nu tau a kanatal Loy-se ta-se-kuwan, yadah ku kanatal a sakaput itini a mueneng. mahini u Wan-kow-a paiyubinan a malacabay, kanatal silamalay zazan pulung nu miculu'ay, kanatal kasitungus malacabayay igtini patizedng. Pow-al-ni a tukay u ahebal a30%u kilakilangan atu piidangan. Pow-al-ni a cen-bu tiniay nu mikuwanay sakay baluhay a tukay patizeng tu syang-mu maedes ku nipikuwan, patizeng tu makayniay tu hulic, mahiniay malumanay a kitizaan a tukay la'tus misakapah pabaluhay patizeng, baluhay a kitizaan uyza taneng misumad misanga' tu pikawawa a luma', nikauzip miedap misanga' tu aenengan a luma'.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == b…ôrn / pow-ar~…ĺ-ni "pow-ar~…ĺ-ni-t…ô a kamu, b*rn, t…ô a kamu b…ôrn,ba a kamu b…ôrn…ô, i-ta-r~…ĺi a ¶udad, b…ôrna, r~…ĺow-man-s a kamu b…ôrna" zuma a ŇčaŇča pow-…ôn, tuki a tukaj, tumaj a tukuj, nu r~…ĺoj-sa r~…ĺj…ôn-paŇč ¶…ôn-bu a kitizaan, tini i r~…ĺoj-s pow-aar~…ĺni-tar~…ĺakaw a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, ujni dada Ē~ ° i su-r~…ĺi-s…ô, z…ô-n…ô-wa atu pa-saj-ar~…ĺ u sakas…ôpat nu tabakiaj a tukuj, nu pow-ar~…ĺ-ni- ¶ow saajawaj a ¶…ôn-bu. pow-ar~…ĺ-ni mar~…ĺiŇčatu patiz…ôŇč i **** a mińß ¶aan, **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa nu r~…ĺoj-s-r~…ĺj…ôn-paŇč ¶…ôn-bu a kitizaan. a-r~…ĺ…ô-ńß…ô par~…ĺatusa…ôn ujni a tukaj, satip a tukus nu bar~…ĺakiajtu a tukuj, sawar~…ĺi bar~…ĺuńßaj a tukuj, bar~…ĺat miawas tu a-r~…ĺ…ô-ńß…ô nu * a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an tu ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj a saŇčaw atu bar~…ĺakiaj a tukuj atu bar~…ĺuńßaj a tukaj patur~…ĺ ńßan. . saajaw i **** a mińß ¶aan, mar~…ĺumanan a kitizaan "pow-ar~…ĺ-ni kasumamadan a tukuj" mar~…ĺa r~…ĺj…ôn-ńß…ô-kow tu nu pasubana Ē~ °aj ¶udad a sakaput nipanut…ôk nu kitakit a nisub…ôr~…ĺidan a zajsaŇč, pow-ar~…ĺ-ni d…ômiad tuduŇč ku akuti Ē~ ° atu kas…ôm…ôtad, dińßku tu kasi…ônawan sapi Ē~ ° tu kar~…ĺar~…ĺudan, nu r~…ĺoj-s a ¶…ôn-bu atu aŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan. u ńß…ôkar~…ĺ **.* kaańß…ôbar~…ĺ mar~…ĺ…ôbut mi, u tad…ômaw **. …ômaŇč "**** a mińß ¶aan". pow-ar~…ĺ-ni, imi u katańßkar~…ĺan nu tumaja kitizaan". pow-ar~…ĺ-ni a tukaj sar~…ĺiŇčatu patiz…ôŇč i ** s…ô- ¶i nu sazikuzaj, katukuńß ** s…ô- ¶i mar~…ĺ…ôpun tu patizaŇč katukuńß ajzaaj a katabaki, u tukaj *** tu a mińß ¶aan a r~…ĺikisi. makaj **** a m ńß ¶aan r~…ĺoj-s-r~…ĺj…ôn-paŇč ¶…ôn-bu a nipatiz…ôŇčan itini ńßawsa, pow-ar~…ĺ-ni nu r~…ĺoj-s a ¶…ôdn-bu atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a aŇčaŇčan. ***, . pow-ar~…ĺ-ni tini i r~…ĺoj-s satipan tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ °, nipatiz…ôŇč i r~…ĺaj-iŇč-ńß…ô sapi ¶a a sa Ē~ °wa ¶ a-r~…ĺ…ô-ńß…ô u saŇčaŇčiwŇčaŇčiw sanaj a zazan, kar~…ĺidkid ku nanum makaj tar~…ĺijuk nu pow-ar~…ĺ-ni mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu bar~…ĺakiaj tu a tukaj, masa tukusaj a subar~…ĺ. pow-ar~…ĺ-ni i kawanan a tukus nu bar~…ĺuńßaj a tukaj, bar~…ĺakiaj a tukuj i kawar~…ĺi nu tukus, pitu mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin ku saŇčaw. mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw u t…ôk u kamu. ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu pow-ar~…ĺ-ni "pasu r~…ĺikutaj a kitizaan" *** tow-pin-ńßaŇč kuŇč-r~…ĺi, r~…ĺabuaj a zijazu Ē~ °**.* …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaw, tar~…ĺakaw nu buju Ē~ ° *** mi. pow-ar~…ĺ-ni i **** a mińß ¶aan patiz…ôŇč tu pikawawan nu ńßitaj. **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa u mit…ôk…ôdaj tu sakaput, **** a mińß ¶aan miar~…ĺ…ôs tu pikuwan nu t…ô-kow pakar~…ĺas tu misat…ôk…ôd, **** a mińß ¶aan mir~…ĺińßiza tu r~…ĺoj-s…ô-r~…ĺj…ôn-paŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu r~…ĺoj-s…ô-r~…ĺj…ôn-paŇč ¶…ôn-bu a kitizaan, paŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu "r~…ĺj…ôn-paŇč tukaj" ńßan.kusi izaw ku kikaj, ¶in-mi- kikaj, mit…ônunaj, ńßwa-sj…ô, misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu sapaju, kakanan, in-swa a sakaput. mikawaw tu tuki a ŇčaŇčan "pjaw-tu" siŇčaŇčan i kitakit. pow-ar~…ĺ-ni misup…ôd tu ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu tau a kanatar~…ĺ r~…ĺoj-s…ô ta-s…ô-kuwan, jadańß ku kanatar~…ĺ a sakaput itini a mu…ôn…ôŇč. mańßini u wan-kow-a paijubinan a mar~…ĺa ¶abaj, kanatar~…ĺ sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj zazan pur~…ĺuŇč nu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj, kanatar~…ĺ kasituŇčus mar~…ĺa ¶abajaj igtini patiz…ôdŇč. pow-ar~…ĺ-ni a tukaj u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ a**%u kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan atu piidaŇčan. pow-ar~…ĺ-ni a ¶…ôn-bu tiniaj nu mikuwanaj sakaj bar~…ĺuńßaj a tukaj patiz…ôŇč tu sjaŇč-mu ma…ôd…ôs ku nipikuwan, patiz…ôŇč tu makajniaj tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶, mańßiniaj mar~…ĺumanaj a kitizaan a tukaj r~…ĺa Ē~ °tus misakapańß pabar~…ĺuńßaj patiz…ôŇč, bar~…ĺuńßaj a kitizaan ujza tan…ôŇč misumad misaŇča Ē~ ° tu pikawawa a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, nikauzip mi…ôdap misaŇča Ē~ ° tu a…ôn…ôŇčan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Bern / Pow-al-ni "Pow-al-ni-te a kamu, B√§rn, Te a kamu Bern,Ba a kamu Berne, I-ta-li a cudad, Berna, Low-man-s a kamu Berna" zuma a nganga Pow-en, tuki a tukay, tumay a tukuy, nu Loy-sa lyen-pangcen-bu a kitizaan, tini i Loy-s Pow-aalni-talakaw a lala', uyni dada' i Su-li-se, Ze-ney-wa atu Pa-say-al u sakasepat nu tabakiay a tukuy, nu Pow-al-ni-cow saayaway a cen-bu. Pow-al-ni malingatu patizeng i 1191 a mihcaan, 1848 a mihcaan mala nu Loy-s-lyen-pang cen-bu a kitizaan. A-le-he palatusaen uyni a tukay, satip a tukus nu balakiaytu a tukuy, sawali baluhay a tukuy, balat miawas tu A-le-he nu 7 a luma'an tu ahebalay a sangaw atu balakiay a tukuy atu baluhay a tukay patul han. . saayaw i 1983 a mihcaan, malumanan a kitizaan "Pow-al-ni kasumamadan a tukuy" mala lyen-he-kow tu nu pasubana'ay cudad a sakaput nipanutek nu kitakit a nisubelidan a zaysang, Pow-al-ni demiad tudung ku akuti' atu kasemetad, dihku tu kasienawan sapi' tu kalaludan, nu Loy-s a cen-bu atu angangan nu lalangawan. u hekal 51.6 kaahebal malebut mi, u tademaw 13. emang "2017 a mihcaan". Pow-al-ni, imi u katahkalan nu tumaya kitizaan". Pow-al-ni a tukay salingatu patizeng i 12 se-ci nu sazikuzay, katukuh 18 se-ci malepun tu patizang katukuh ayzaay a katabaki, u tukay 800 tu a mihcaan a likisi. makay 1848 a m hcaan Loy-s-lyen-pang cen-bu a nipatizengan itini hawsa, Pow-al-ni nu Loy-s a cedn-bu atu lalangawan a angangan. šľĮÁąĺŚįľ, . Pow-al-ni tini i Loy-s satipan talakaway a buyu', nipatizeng i Lay-ing-he sapica a sa'wac A-le-he u sangangiwngangiw sanay a zazan, kalidkid ku nanum makay taliyuk nu Pow-al-ni micaliway tu balakiay tu a tukay, masa tukusay a subal. Pow-al-ni i kawanan a tukus nu baluhay a tukay, balakiay a tukuy i kawali nu tukus, pitu malalitin ku sangaw. muenengay a tademaw u Tek u kamu. hekal nu Pow-al-ni "pasu likutay a kitizaan" 230 tow-pin-hang kung-li, labuay a ziyazu'12.4 emang ku tademaw, talakaw nu buyu' 550 mi. Pow-al-ni i 1191 a mihcaan patizeng tu pikawawan nu hitay. 1218 a mihcaan mala u mitekeday tu sakaput, 1339 a mihcaan miales tu pikuwan nu Te-kow pakalas tu misateked, 1353 a mihcaan milihiza tu Loy-se-lyen-pang. 1848 a mihcaan malingatu Loy-se-lyen-pang cen-bu a kitizaan, pangangan aca tu "lyen-pang tukay" han.kusi izaw ku kikay, cin-mi- kikay, mitenunay, hwa-sye, misanga'ay tu sapayu, kakanan, in-swa a sakaput. mikawaw tu tuki a ngangan "pyaw-tu" singangan i kitakit. Pow-al-ni misuped tu 80 ku luma' nu tau a kanatal Loy-se ta-se-kuwan, yadah ku kanatal a sakaput itini a mueneng. mahini u Wan-kow-a paiyubinan a malacabay, kanatal silamalay zazan pulung nu miculu'ay, kanatal kasitungus malacabayay igtini patizedng. Pow-al-ni a tukay u ahebal a30%u kilakilangan atu piidangan. Pow-al-ni a cen-bu tiniay nu mikuwanay sakay baluhay a tukay patizeng tu syang-mu maedes ku nipikuwan, patizeng tu makayniay tu hulic, mahiniay malumanay a kitizaan a tukay la'tus misakapah pabaluhay patizeng, baluhay a kitizaan uyza taneng misumad misanga' tu pikawawa a luma', nikauzip miedap misanga' tu aenengan a luma'.

a tukaj, tumaj a tukuj, nu r~…ĺoj-sa r~…ĺj…ôn-paŇč ¶…ôn-bu a kitizaan, tini i r~…ĺoj-s pow-aar~…ĺni-tar~…ĺakaw a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, ujni dada Ē~ ° i su-r~…ĺi-s…ô, z…ô-n…ô-wa atu pa-saj-ar~…ĺ u a-r~…ĺ…ô-ńß…ô par~…ĺatusa…ôn ujni a tukaj, satip a tukus nu bar~…ĺakiajtu a tukuj, sawar~…ĺi bar~…ĺuńßaj a tukuj, bar~…ĺat miawas tu a-r~…ĺ…ô-ńß…ô nu * a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an tu ańß…ôbar~…ĺaj a saŇčaw atu bar~…ĺakiaj a tukuj atu bar~…ĺuńßaj a tukaj patur~…ĺ ńßan. . saajaw i **** a mińß ¶aan, mar~…ĺumanan a kitizaan "pow-ar~…ĺ-ni kasumamadan a tukuj" mar~…ĺa r~…ĺj…ôn-ńß…ô-kow tu nu pasubana Ē~ °aj ¶udad sar~…ĺiŇčatu patiz…ôŇč i ** s…ô- ¶i nu sazikuzaj, katukuńß ** s…ô- ¶i mar~…ĺ…ôpun tu patizaŇč katukuńß ajzaaj a katabaki, u tukaj *** tu a mińß ¶aan a r~…ĺikisi. makaj **** a m ńß ¶aan r~…ĺoj-s-r~…ĺj…ôn-paŇč ¶…ôn-bu a nipatiz…ôŇčan itini ńßawsa, pow-ar~…ĺ-ni nu r~…ĺoj-s a ¶…ôdn-bu atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a aŇčaŇčan. ***, . pow-ar~…ĺ-ni tini i r~…ĺoj-s satipan tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ °, nipatiz…ôŇč i r~…ĺaj-iŇč-ńß…ô sapi ¶a a sa Ē~ °wa ¶ a-r~…ĺ…ô-ńß…ô u saŇčaŇčiwŇčaŇčiw sanaj a zazan, kar~…ĺidkid ku nanum makaj tar~…ĺijuk nu pow-ar~…ĺ-ni mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu bar~…ĺakiaj tu a tukaj, masa tukusaj a subar~…ĺ. pow-ar~…ĺ-ni i kawanan a tukus nu bar~…ĺuńßaj a tukaj, bar~…ĺakiaj a tukuj i kawar~…ĺi nu tukus, pitu mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin ku saŇčaw. mu…ôn…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw u t…ôk u kamu. ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu pow-ar~…ĺ-ni "pasu r~…ĺikutaj a kitizaan" *** tow-pin-ńßaŇč kuŇč-r~…ĺi, r~…ĺabuaj a zijazu Ē~ °**.* …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaw, tar~…ĺakaw nu buju Ē~ ° *** mi. pow-ar~…ĺ-ni i **** a mińß ¶aan patiz…ôŇč tu r~…ĺoj-s…ô-r~…ĺj…ôn-paŇč. **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu r~…ĺoj-s…ô-r~…ĺj…ôn-paŇč ¶…ôn-bu a kitizaan, paŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu "r~…ĺj…ôn-paŇč tukaj" ńßan.kusi izaw ku kikaj, ¶in-mi- kikaj, mit…ônunaj, ńßwa-sj…ô, misaŇča Ē~ °aj tu sapaju, kakanan, in-swa a sakaput. mikawaw tu tuki a ŇčaŇčan "pjaw-tu" siŇčaŇčan i kitakit. pow-ar~…ĺ-ni misup…ôd tu ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu tau a kanatar~…ĺ r~…ĺoj-s…ô mar~…ĺa ¶abajaj igtini patiz…ôdŇč. pow-ar~…ĺ-ni a tukaj u ańß…ôbar~…ĺ a**%u kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan atu piidaŇčan. pow-ar~…ĺ-ni a ¶…ôn-bu tiniaj nu mikuwanaj sakaj bar~…ĺuńßaj a tukaj patiz…ôŇč tu sjaŇč-mu ma…ôd…ôs ku nipikuwan, patiz…ôŇč tu makajniaj tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶, mańßiniaj mar~…ĺumanaj a kitizaan a tukaj r~…ĺa Ē~ °tus misakapańß pabar~…ĺuńßaj patiz…ôŇč, bar~…ĺuńßaj a kitizaan ujza tan…ôŇč misumad misaŇča Ē~ ° tu pikawawa a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, nikauzip mi…ôdap misaŇča Ē~ ° tu a…ôn…ôŇčan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °.
